prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Fiat 1.4L 16V Turbo (182hp) from the Fiat Punto HGT (engine code: 188 A5.000)** with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Carrillo rods) and a **Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger** running 1.2 bar of boost, paired with a **Tial 44mm external wastegate** and **3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe**

Full **Motec M130 ECU** standalone management with **Bosch Motorsport 1000cc injectors**, **Walbro 255lph fuel pump**, and **NGK Iridium IX (LFR7IX-11) spark plugs** for optimized ignition under high boost

Custom **Koni Sport Yellow adjustable coilovers (82-1235SP2)** with **Eibach Pro-Kit springs (15mm drop)** and **Whiteline adjustable sway bars (22mm front, 18mm rear)** for chassis rigidity, paired with **Brembo 4-piston calipers (from Fiat Coupe 20v Turbo)** on 280mm vented rotors
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Uno Turbo widebody kit** (FRP construction) with **custom carbon fiber front splitter** and **rear diffuser**, paired with **OMP carbon fiber side skirts** for aggressive stance
**Recaro SRD (Evo IX) bucket seats** in **Alcantara/leather (custom FIAT blue stitching)** with **Sabelt 6-point harnesses**, mounted on **Sparco Pro 2000 seat rails** for FIA compliance

**OZ Racing Superleggera III wheels (15x8 ET15 front, 15x9 ET0 rear)** in **Gunmetal finish**, wrapped in **Pirelli P-Zero Trofeo R (195/45/15 front, 225/40/15 rear)** for maximum grip, with **custom FIAT Abarth-style side decals** in **Gloss Black**
